qa_pairs.question: What actions can a user take if Ansys Fluent crashes during the initial automatic mesh partitioning phase when using standard Intel-based scripts with the parallel solver?
qa_pairs.answer: If Ansys Fluent crashes during the initial automatic mesh partitioning phase with standard Intel-based scripts, users can utilize the Narval tabs, which provide more robust alternatives, or manually perform the mesh partitioning in the Fluent graphical user interface (GUI) to inspect partition statistics and specify the partitioning method for an optimal result.

qa_pairs.question: What are the recommendations for optimal efficiency when performing mesh partitioning in Ansys Fluent?
qa_pairs.answer: For optimal efficiency in Ansys Fluent mesh partitioning, the number of mesh partitions should be an integral multiple of the number of cores, and it is recommended to ensure there are at least 10,000 cells per core.
